_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: JM Aroma
project.address: Plot No. GH-04, Eco City, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.description: JM Aroma is a premium ready-to-move-in residential complex in Sector 75, Noida, offering exceptionally spacious 3 and 4 BHK Vastu-compliant family apartments.
project.long_description: JM Aroma is a highly established ready-to-move-in residential society spread over 5 acres in Sector 75, Noida. Developed by the highly reputed builder JM Housing Ltd, the project consists of 598 beautifully designed apartments spread across 7 elegant high-rise towers rising G+17 floors. Spanning a prime central location in Noida, the society is particularly famous for its 'Vastu-compliant' layouts, featuring 12 customized apartment variations designed to optimize sunlight and natural air circulation. Standard features in the apartments include laminated wooden flooring in the master bedrooms, decorative hardwood flush doors, modular kitchen setups, and premium sanitary fittings. The gated complex offers a rich array of standard lifestyle amenities, including a central swimming pool, a fully-equipped gymnasium, a dedicated senior citizen sitout zone, and multiple manicured park landscapes. Despite its superb habitability and prime walking-distance connection to the Sector 50 Metro Station and Spectrum Mall, prospective buyers in the secondary resale market should perform rigorous checks on property registration. Approximately 350 units in the society have registries pending due to unresolved land lease dues between the developer SPC and the Noida Authority.
marketing_claims: Double Balcony Layouts for Optimal Airflow
Gated Security with Video Doorbell Systems
project.project_risk_flag: Moderate: Registries are partially blocked due to pending builder dues to Noida Authority under the Eco City SPC.
registry_embargo_reasons: Outstanding land dues of Eco City consortium with Noida Authority causing slow registry handovers for nearly 350 units.

builder.name: JM Housing Limited
builder.company_overview: JM Housing Limited (incorporated in Vivek Vihar, Delhi) is a mid-segment developer known for solid, spacious family housing complexes in Delhi NCR. With over two decades of operation, the developer has delivered major projects including JM Park Sapphire and JM Aroma, focusing heavily on residential habitability, structural layouts, and high Vastu compliance.

assumptions: Ready-to-move resale unit purchase. GST is 0%.

project_dna.rera_compliance_label: Legacy Project (Unregistered under RERA for some parts)

decision_profile.decision_thesis: JM Aroma offers excellent Vastu-compliant layouts in a highly connected ready-to-move 5-acre society, but is severely affected by partial registration delays.
why_buy: Vastu Compliant Planning: 12 distinct Vastu floor layouts with optimal sun orientation.
Metro Convenience: Just 5 minutes from Sector 50 metro station.
Excellent Room Sizes: Highly spacious bedrooms and drawing rooms compared to typical Noida projects.
Active Community: 598 families fully residing with operational common services.
why_avoid: Registry Delays: Over 350 registries out of 600 remain pending for 9 years due to unpaid developer land dues.
Maintenance Friction: High maintenance dues debates between builder and AOA.
Consortium Association: Sub-leased under Eco City land, exposing it to broader group liabilities.
decision_profile.best_for: Buyers seeking highly Vastu-compliant, spacious ready-to-move 3/4 BHK homes in Central Noida at fair resale values.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Buyers who prioritize instant and immediate registration execution or standard corporate bank financing on all units.

buyerPersonas.headline: Top-tier Vastu Alignments
reasons: Designed extensively for energy flow and sunlight entry.
Laminated wooden master bedroom floors and modular kitchens.

riskRadar.description: Over 350 units have registries pending due to Noida Authority dues clearance requirements.
Disputes on common area upkeep and AOA handovers.

transparency_checks.label: OC / CC Received
transparency_checks.details: Partial CC/OC; registries are pending for many units.

transparency_checks.label: Registry Active
transparency_checks.details: Partially active; slow execution under December 2023 rehab package.

transparency_checks.label: Escrow Account
transparency_checks.details: Legacy completed project, no builder escrow active.

transparency_checks.label: NCLT Moratorium
transparency_checks.details: No active NCLT bankruptcy against JM Housing Ltd.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent rental income and slow capital appreciation.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Very popular among corporate tenants; 3 BHK rent is ₹32,00,000 - ₹45,000/month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Demand remains firm due to Spectrum Mall and metro walking distance.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Registered units exit fast (30-45 days); unregistered units require cash-heavy buyers.

persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Families prioritizing room size and traditional floor plan configurations over ultra-modern high-density complex styles.
persona_descriptions.NRI: Not ideal for NRIs due to pending registry dues issue.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate (preferring physical ready structures, willing to verify tower-wise registry records)
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT hubs or Noida Expressway
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to purchase spacious, structurally robust, Vastu-compliant homes in the center of Sector 75 Noida, ensuring the chosen resale unit has registry clearance.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: A great, spacious ready-to-move housing society with beautiful Vastu alignments. Strictly verify that the resale flat has a cleared registry or falls in the active registry execution list under the 2023 rehab scheme.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Spacious rooms, highly functional balconies, and peaceful residential environment. Spectrum Mall and metro walking convenience make daily life highly seamless.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Excellent asset for robust monthly rental yields, but avoid if short-term capital appreciation is the primary goal.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Plentiful open spaces for elderly sitouts and secure children zones.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Yields are highly predictable (3.8-4.2%) due to premium location and rental popularity.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: A standard mid-premium society; does not offer ultra-luxury vertical lobby specs, but solid ceramic and laminated finishes are highly durable.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Main risk is purchasing an unregistered unit whose seller has pending dues. Ensure zero-dues NOC from both builder and Noida Authority is presented before signing agreement.
walk_away_conditions: Sellers offering unregistered flats with zero clearance path or unclear ledger accounts.
Unresolved lift-safety issues in target tower.
negotiation_leverage: Leverage the active registry delays to negotiate the price down by ₹1,00,000 - ₹1,500/sqft from registered equivalents in Sector 75.
Use outstanding maintenance disputes as a bargaining point.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: A solid asset. Look for registered resale units listed at ₹1.35 Cr to ₹1.65 Cr for immediate acquisition.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Slightly more spacious bedroom carpet areas and superior Vastu alignments.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Fully clean registry status; zero pending municipal dues; Mivan aluminum construction tech.
competitors.verdict: Panchsheel is a cleaner and faster purchase choice; JM Aroma wins on layout sizes and Vastu details.
competitors.price_delta_note: JM Aroma is priced at par or slightly cheaper.
